overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk street food stall in Night City. The camera moves along a green counter past a female vendor, through a narrow storage corridor with metal shelving, and emerges at a cooking station with a steaming wok and customers. Neon lights and red paper lanterns illuminate the scene with vibrant green and red hues.

agents.ego_description: moving slowly along the green counter, observing the vendor and the street ahead

notable_agents.action: female vendor with bandana standing behind counter with arms crossed, looking toward the street

entered.detail: long green metal counter with glass display case and reflective surface
woman wearing bandana and sleeveless jacket standing behind the counter
glowing neon signs with Japanese characters and circular logo
string of red paper lanterns hanging above the street opening
opening leading to the main pedestrian street with distant figures visible

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a cyberpunk street food stall, positioned behind a long green counter. A female vendor stands to the left with arms crossed, while neon signs and red paper lanterns glow in the distance. The camera moves slowly forward along the counter, revealing the narrow enclosed space of the vendor stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow storage corridor with metal shelving

events.description: moves from the open counter area into a narrow enclosed storage corridor with metal shelving
exits the dark storage corridor into the open cooking area with visible steam

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow storage corridor between tall metal shelving units filled with supplies

entered.detail: tall metal wire shelving units filled with cardboard boxes and supplies
stacked cardboard boxes and containers on the shelves
vertical red banner with white Japanese text and circular symbol

elements.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow, dimly lit storage corridor between metal shelving units stocked with boxes. The space is enclosed with no sky visible, creating a claustrophobic transition zone between the front counter and the cooking area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cooking station with wok and customer seating

events.description: steam from the cooking wok becomes prominent as camera approaches the cooking surface

agents.ego_description: moving past the cooking station and observing the wok, steam, and customers eating at the counter

notable_agents.action: customer with green hair and cybernetic implants sitting at counter eating noodles
chef working at the wok station, stirring noodles with cooking utensils

entered.detail: large metal wok on heating element with noodles being stir-fried
rising steam and smoke from the hot cooking surface creating atmospheric haze
metal spatula and cooking tools resting at the wok station
counter seating area with bowls, chopsticks, and customers eating
glowing neon signs including a '24' sign and Japanese characters
string of red paper lanterns hanging above the cooking area

elements.scene_description: Emerging from the storage corridor, the scene opens into the cooking area where a large wok sizzles with noodles and steam rises into the air. Customers sit at the counter to the right eating, while neon signs and red lanterns illuminate the semi-covered space with vibrant cyberpunk lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cyberpunk street food stall, transitioning from a public service counter into the narrow, enclosed depths of the vendor's workspace. It begins behind a long green counter where a female vendor stands with her arms crossed under the glow of distant neon signs and red paper lanterns. As the camera glides slowly forward, the open atmosphere of the street shifts into the confined interior of the stall. The scene then narrows further, moving past the counter's edge to reveal the tight, functional layout of the vendor's private operational area.
